description: Arithmetic on two NOT NULL columns produces a non-nullable result

columns.name: line_total
columns.note: both price and quantity are NOT NULL, so product is non-nullable

name: arithmetic
query_sql:
-- @name GetLineTotal
-- @returns :many
SELECT price * quantity AS line_total FROM order_items
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE order_items (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, order_id INTEGER NOT NULL, product_id INTEGER NOT NULL, quantity INTEGER NOT NULL, price INTEGER NOT NULL)
